title: Vision Pretraining for Dense Spatial Perception
innovation_summary: Vision Pretraining for Dense Spatial Perception: Concretely, we propose masked boundary modeling, a self-supervised paradigm that dynamically learns sub-pixel boundary representations and subsequently leverages the discovered boundary-bearing tokens as masked targets to.
